creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, Jun 14, 2000 at 10:07:13PM -0400, sjr@home.com wrote:
 
 > +RUN_DEPENDS+=	${LOCALBASE}/lib/perl5/site_perl/${PERL_VERSION}/${PERL_ARCH}/SNMP.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-SNMP
 
 This makes a neat circular dependency. :-> I don't think asami-san
 or his package building scripts would think much of me.
 
 --
